title: rosa rugosa var. nitens
intro: Rosa rugosa var. nitens is a varietal of the rugosa rose, a shrub native to East Asia. It is known for its fragrant flowers, used in herbal medicine, which have anti-inflammatory properties, particularly in treating wounds and reducing fever. The plant's medicinal properties also include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues and promote overall health. Rosa rugosa var. nitens can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health benefits.
